Unified Mine Rescue Training (Advanced): Underground Coal and Metal/Nonmetal Mines — IG 115
fields.description: The primary advanced-level curriculum for underground coal and metal/nonmetal mine rescue teams. Covers team organization, exploration and recovery procedures, ventilation control, and firefighting — the core reference most active teams train from.

fields.title: Unified Mine Rescue Training (Advanced) Appendix — Visuals Only
fields.description: Companion visuals book for IG 115 — the diagrams, maps, and illustrations referenced throughout the advanced training guide, without the accompanying text.

fields.title: Initial Mine Rescue Team Training: Coal and Metal/Nonmetal Mines — MSHA 3026 (formerly IG 5)
fields.description: The starting point for a newly formed mine rescue team, coal or metal/nonmetal. Introduces basic team roles, breathing apparatus, and fundamental rescue procedures before moving on to IG 115.

fields.title: Mine Rescue Team Training: Metal and Nonmetal Mines — MSHA 3027 (formerly IG 6)
fields.description: Metal/nonmetal-specific team training, covering procedures and hazards unique to MNM mines that aren't addressed in the coal-focused guides.

fields.title: Advanced Mine Rescue Training: Coal Mines — IG 7
fields.description: Advanced coal-mine-specific rescue training, building on the initial guide with more complex exploration, ventilation, and recovery scenarios found in coal mines.

fields.title: Advanced Skills Training (AST): Activities for Coal Mine Rescue Teams — IG 7a
fields.description: A set of hands-on practice activities and drills for coal mine rescue teams to sharpen the skills covered in IG 7 — useful for regular team practice sessions.

fields.title: Responding to a Mine Emergency: Training Responsible Persons at Underground Coal Mines — IG 110
fields.description: Training aimed at the responsible persons who must recognize and respond to a mine emergency at an underground coal mine before the rescue team arrives — not the rescue team itself.

fields.title: Section I: Coal Mine Rescue Rules
Section II: Metal and Nonmetal Mine Rescue Rules
Section VI: BG ProAir Oxygen Dosage Bench Rules
MR Written Exam Disc Summary Sheet
